scripts.test:unit: pnpm exec tsx --test 'tests/unit/**/*.test.ts' && pnpm --dir apps/api exec node --import tsx/esm --test --test-concurrency=1 'src/services/**/*.test.ts' 'src/http/**/*.test.ts' 'src/db/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:integration: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm test:e2e:seed && pnpm exec tsx --env-file apps/api/.env.local --test --test-concurrency=1 'tests/integration/**/*.test.ts' && pnpm --dir apps/api test:integration
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm test:e2e:seed && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm test:e2e:seed && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:debug: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm test:e2e:seed && playwright test --headed --debug
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.dev:all: zsh -lc 'set -m; pnpm --dir apps/api dev & API_PID=$!; pnpm --dir apps/web dev & WEB_PID=$!; pnpm --dir apps/worker dev & WORKER_PID=$!; trap "kill $API_PID $WEB_PID $WORKER_PID 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; wait'
scripts.verify:ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed:ci && pnpm synthetic:run
